archetype: Soft Luxury & Organic Elegance (Archetype 5 / Light Variant)
design_philosophy: Museum-like presentation. The product is fine art. Generous white space, soft feminine tones (blush, beige), high-contrast slender serif typography, and gold highlights for a premium editorial Instagram-inspired aesthetic.

grid_patterns.categories: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-8 (Bento style: vary heights, span 2 for bridal/hero category)

surfaces_and_components.header: Glassmorphism: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200/50, sticky top-0 z-50.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1C1917] text-white hover:bg-[#D4AF37] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-sans uppercase tracking-widest text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1C1917] text-[#1C1917] hover:bg-[#FDF2F8] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-sans uppercase tracking-widest text-sm
buttons.whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-transform z-50

cards.product: group relative border-none bg-transparent. Image wrapper overflow-hidden bg-[#FAFAF9]. Hover triggers image scale. No heavy drop shadows, use pure minimalist borders if needed.
cards.badges: absolute top-4 left-4 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm text-[#1C1917] px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

surfaces_and_components.animations: Subtle, luxurious. Use Framer Motion for fade-in-up on scroll. Image scales up 105% on hover smoothly.
surfaces_and_components.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for clean minimalist icons. Stroke width 1.5.

pages_and_sections.name: Header
pages_and_sections.details: Logo centered: 'Aavya' in Italianno/cursive font with a subtle lucide Lotus icon above it in gold. Nav links left (Shop, Categories, Collections), Icons right (Search, Wishlist, Cart Drawer).

pages_and_sections.name: Hero Section
pages_and_sections.details: 80vh full bleed or split screen. Left side: delicate typography, 'Elegance Redefined', Shop Now CTA. Right/Background: Bridal jewelry model image. Subtle gold gradient overlay.

pages_and_sections.name: Featured Categories
pages_and_sections.details: Bento Grid layout (Tetris style). Earrings, Necklaces, Bridal Sets, Oxidised. Overlays on images: bg-black/20 with white serif text.

pages_and_sections.name: Best Sellers / Trending
pages_and_sections.details: Carousel or grid of product cards. Discount badge, wishlist heart icon on top right. Add to cart button appears on hover over image.

pages_and_sections.name: Weekend Sale Banner
pages_and_sections.details: Full width soft blush pink background (#FDF2F8). Gold accent text. 'Weekend Exclusive: Flat 10% Off on Bridal Sets'. Code: AAVYA10.

pages_and_sections.name: Why Choose Us
pages_and_sections.details: 4 column minimalist icon row. Icons: ShieldCheck (Authentic), Truck (Free Shipping), RefreshCw (Easy Returns), Gem (Premium Quality).

pages_and_sections.name: Instagram Social Proof
pages_and_sections.details: Title: 'Styled By You #AavyaFashion'. Edge-to-edge grid of lifestyle model images wearing jewelry. No gaps or 2px gaps.

pages_and_sections.name: Footer & Newsletter
pages_and_sections.details: Soft Beige background (#F5F5F0). Newsletter input: transparent background, bottom border only. Elegant links layout.

pages_and_sections.name: Product Detail Page
pages_and_sections.details: Sticky product details on right, scrolling image gallery on left. Accordions for Details, Styling Tips, Reviews. COD Available badge. 'Buy Now' main CTA, 'Add to Cart' secondary CTA.

media_assets.logo_concept: Text 'Aavya' in cursive (Italianno font) with a gold (#D4AF37) Lotus icon (use lucide-react <Flower /> or <Sprout /> or custom SVG) placed above or beside.

technical_instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Install and use 'framer-motion' for scroll and hover animations.

Install fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Italianno&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&display=swap');
Configure Tailwind spacing scale and colors per these guidelines.
Ensure all interactive elements and key informational elements have a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based names (e.g., data-testid='shop-now-button').
For the E-commerce flow, implement local state or React Context for Cart, Wishlist, and Checkout.
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' wrappers for products; use plain HTML/Tailwind divs for more creative freedom.
Floating WhatsApp button must have high z-index and fixed positioning.
Use strict semantic HTML. Product cards should use <article>, sections should use <section>.
